title: Saudi, U.S., and Russian crude flows drive tanker momentum
section_path: Saudi, U.S., and Russian crude flows drive tanker momentum
section_path_text: Saudi, U.S., and Russian crude flows drive tanker momentum
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Week 40 | October 9, 2025
This week's analysis examines evolving dirty freight and supply trends across the AG, WAFR, and Mediterranean, alongside a notable acceleration in outbound crude volumes from Saudi Arabia, the United States, and Russia. Spotlight of the Week: Seaborne Oil Exports | Saudi Arabia, Russia, U.S. Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2025-10-13_saudi-us-and-russian-crude-flows-drive-tanker-momentum_img_unnamed_bc7cf6bf46d3.png
Seaborne oil exports rose 10.4% year-on-year in September, the sharpest annual gain since early 2023, as shipments from Saudi Arabia, Russia, and the U.S.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Week 40 | October 9, 2025
This week's analysis examines evolving dirty freight and supply trends across the AG, WAFR, and Mediterranean, alongside a notable acceleration in outbound crude volumes from Saudi Arabia, the United States, and Russia. Spotlight of the Week: Seaborne Oil Exports | Saudi Arabia, Russia, U.S.

children.title: China (Discharge Area)
children.summary:
Congestion of VLCCs at Chinese discharge ports has significantly decreased, with an average of 32 vessels, a notable drop from the peak of 47 observed in early November 2024. However, congestion remains well above the early-year trough of 20 vessels
Image reference: unnamed (3).png | assets/2025-10-13_saudi-us-and-russian-crude-flows-drive-tanker-momentum_img_unnamed28329_175830f436d1.png

children.title: AG (Load Area)
children.summary: Congestion in the Arabian Gulf has seen a significant reduction, with the number of vessels falling sharply from 60 in mid-year to only 31. This notable decline is one of the most substantial observed recently, pointing to improved vessel turnaround times and more efficient loading operations.
